FINAL CONCLUSION / DIRECTION:
The provided patent_indicators.parquet successfully reproduces the
Arts et al. (2021) NLP novelty and impact metrics. Descriptive statistics
align with the paper's award-patent benchmarks within expected sampling
variation. The reuse aggregation correctly follows the additive formula
|set| + Σui (not the multiplicative typo in the manuscript), ensuring
impact scores properly reflect cumulative downstream adoption. Cosine
similarity measures are consistent with standardized distributions.
Direction: These validated indicators can be directly used for downstream
classification, regression, or diffusion analysis without further
transformation. Researchers should apply log(1+x) to count metrics before
modeling to match the paper's empirical specification.
